section_name: Application to Be Filed; Fee for Duplication and Mailing
text:
(a) A copy of the application shall be filed in the General Land Office and in the office of the county judge of the adjacent coastal county.

(b) The public may inspect or duplicate the application during normal business hours. A reasonable fee may be charged for duplicating and mailing the application.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 52. Tex. Deepwater Port Procedures Act
##### § 52.005 — Application to Be Filed; Fee for Duplication and Mailing

(a) A copy of the application shall be filed in the General Land Office and in the office of the county judge of the adjacent coastal county.

(b) The public may inspect or duplicate the application during normal business hours. A reasonable fee may be charged for duplicating and mailing the application.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A copy of the application shall be filed in the General Land Office and in the office of the county judge of the adjacent coastal county.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The public may inspect or duplicate the application during normal business hours. A reasonable fee may be charged for duplicating and mailing the application.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
